name: LangWatch
description: LangWatch — LLM monitoring and analytics platform for tracking quality, cost, and performance of AI pipelines.

seo.title: LangWatch — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: LangWatch: LangWatch — LLM monitoring and analytics platform for tracking quality, cost, and performance of AI pipelines.

when_to_use: Monitoring LLM app quality with real-time guardrail checks
Detecting hallucinations and policy violations in production traces
Running automated annotation for LLM outputs at scale
Visualizing conversation quality metrics across model versions

pros: Clean LLM observability with cost and quality metrics
cons: Crowded space vs Langfuse, Helicone, Arize
Evaluation depth varies by use case
review.verdict: A credible pick for LLM observability, especially if open-source matters to you.
review.best_for: Teams shipping LLM features needing cost, latency and quality dashboards
review.not_for: Enterprises wanting the largest vendor with deepest integrations
